name: @clearline/demo-beacon
description: Project-agnostic, page-aware demo helper: a Help Scout Beacon-style floating launcher + panel that tells testers/reviewers what the mock backend supports on the page they're on, and lets them act on it (copy test inputs, walk guided flows, run app-supplied actions). Router-, backend-, and design-system-agnostic — pages self-register config via useDemoBeacon; all side effects cross the boundary as callbacks. Extractable into any React POC.

metadata.extractable: Runtime deps: React + @radix-ui/react-dialog only. Themes via --beacon-* CSS custom properties (with fallbacks). No app/feature-lib imports; enforced by Nx lint boundaries.
metadata.adr: specs (or docs)/adr — hook-registration over route-mapping; static config over live MSW introspection.
